rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Rundll32 with Suspicious Process Lineage

rules.rule_text:
title: Rundll32 with Suspicious Process Lineage
id: 5025ecc7-1efd-41de-aee2-38f4b9d8d281
status: experimental
description: "As is the case with most techniques in this report, it's critical that\
  \ \nyou are able to take stock of what is normal in your environment if you \nhope\
  \ to be able to identify what isn't. In the context of Rundll32, you\u2019ll \n\
  want to monitor for executions of rundll32.exe from unusual parent processes, \n\
  and the following pseudo-analytic\u2014based on an amalgamation of Red Canary \n\
  detection logic\u2014should help security teams do just that. Part of the RedCanary\
  \ \n2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/rundll32/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1218
- attack.t1218.011
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - \winword.exe
    - \excel.exe
    - \msaccess.exe
    - \lsass.exe
    - \taskeng.exe
    - \winlogon.exe
    - \schtasks.exe
    - \regsvr32.exe
    - \wmiprvse.exe
    - \wsmprovhost.exe
    Image|endswith: \rundll32.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
